body:
closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/issues/1114

The PR removes all of the `pkgversion` checks for ClimaCore and set the minimum version of ClimaDiagnostics to be v0.3.0. All of the `pkgversion` checks for ClimaCore can be removed because the minimum version of ClimaCore that can be used with ClimaLand is v0.14.46. The minimum version of ClimaDiagnostics is set to v0.3.0 because the leaderboard code assumes ClimaDiagnostics v0.3.0 or greater. Older versions of ClimaDiagnostics were allowed to allow ClimaCoupler to run with ClimaLand but this is not needed now.
title: Clean up pkgversion checks and set ClimaDiagnostics in compat to 0.3
